questions.statement:
<p><u style="font-weight: 700;">Direction</u><span style="font-weight: 700;">: The sentence is divided into four parts. Find out which part has an error and mark it as your answer. If there is no error, mark &#39;No error&#39; as your answer.</span></p>

<p>A friend of her,&nbsp;(A) / who is a florist, asks (B) / if she can advertise on the site.&nbsp;(C) / No error (D)</p>

<p>Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the given word.</p>

<p>FRACTATE</p>

<p>In the following question, out of the given four alternatives, select the alternative which best expresses the meaning of the Idiom/Phrase.</p>

<p>Music to one&#39;s ears</p>
<strong>In the following question, four words are given out of which one word is incorrectly spelt. Find the incorrectly spelt word.</strong>
questions.explanation:
The spelling of <strong>Inflliction </strong>is wrong. The correct spelling is &#39;&#39;<strong>infliction</strong>.&#39;&#39; It means &#39;&#39;

<div style="display:inline">the action of inflicting something unpleasant or painful on someone or something.&#39;&#39; All the other words are its synonyms. <strong>So option 1 is correct.&nbsp;</strong></div>

questions.statement:
<p><u style="font-weight: 700;">Direction</u><span style="font-weight: 700;">: The sentence is divided into four parts. Find out which part has an error and mark it as your answer. If there is no error, mark &#39;No error&#39; as your answer.</span></p>

<p>The rest of the money (A) /&nbsp;was their&nbsp;to spend (B) / as they pleased.&nbsp;(C) / No error (D)</p>
Choose the word that is opposite in meaning to &quot;Nephelococcygia&quot;

<p><span style="font-weight: 700;">Find the part of the sentence that contains an error:</span></p>

<p>(1) The restoration of the Baroque cathedral was not so much an attempt to modernize the structure / (2) as it was a dedicated effort to preserve the intricate stucco work / (3) and the gilded altarpieces that had&nbsp;tarnished / (4)&nbsp;by decades of exposure to industrial pollutants and humidity.</p>

<p><strong>Select the most appropriate synonym of the underlined word.</strong></p>

<p>Your essay greatly <strong><u>exceeds</u></strong> the word limit.</p>
<p><strong>Choose the correctly spelled word from among the given options.&nbsp;</strong></p>
questions.explanation: Option 2 is the correct choice as &#39;rejig&#39; means &#39;<span style="font-family:arial,sans-serif">organize (something) differently; rearrange.&#39; Thus option 2 is the correct answer.</span>

<p><span style="font-weight: 700; ">Select the option that expresses the given sentence into an indirect speech.</span></p>

<p>Tina said, &ldquo;Let Preeti do her worst, she cannot harm her.&rdquo;</p>
options: Tina declared that though Preeti might do her worst, she could not harm her. /
Tina told that though Preeti might be doing her worst, she could not harm her. /
Tina declared that though Preeti may do her worst, she can not harm her. /
Tina said to&nbsp;Preeti&nbsp;that she might do her worst, she could not harm her. /
